header: Everything you need to ship with confidence
subheadline: One platform that replaces five tools, so your team stops stitching workflows together and starts shipping.

items.title: Launch in minutes
items.description: Connect your stack and go live the same afternoon. No migration project, no professional-services contract.

items.title: Enterprise-grade security
items.description: SOC 2 Type II, SSO, and granular roles keep security and compliance teams comfortable from day one.

items.title: Decisions backed by data
items.description: Live dashboards turn raw events into the three metrics your team actually acts on each week.

items.title: Built for collaboration
items.description: Shared workspaces, comments, and audit trails keep design, product, and engineering on the same page.

items.title: Hours back every week
items.description: Automations handle the repetitive busywork, freeing roughly 40 hours per person each month.

items.title: Fast everywhere
items.description: Content is served from 200+ edge locations, so every customer loads in under 100 milliseconds.
